violations.text: The prep sink adjacent to the 3-bay sink requires a splash guard to prevent possible sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The cutting boards of the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving racks and the fan covers in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of food residue, and biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The faucet of the prep sink was observed to be leaking. A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The walls in the cookline and ware-washing area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
